decision.title: UI-first vertical slice build order
decision.summary: Following AGENTS.md mandate: build visible UI first, systems second. Title screen -> rooms -> combat -> forge -> pressure -> dialogue -> HUD -> content -> polish.
decision.impact: Every phase produces visible, playable output. No invisible backend-only phases.

decision.title: KAPLAY for game framework
decision.summary: Using KAPLAY (kaboom successor) for rendering, scene management, and game objects. Lightweight, TypeScript-friendly, good for 2D games.
decision.impact: All scenes use KAPLAY scene system. UI elements use KAPLAY text/rect primitives.

decision.title: Authored content in JSON packs
decision.summary: All game content (floors, enemies, spells, dialogue) lives in JSON files. No procedural generation per requirements.
decision.impact: Content changes don't require code changes. Entity model is data-driven.
